title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Calcutta. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
